name: PM-Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Providing financial assistance of ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments to small and marginal farmer families.

name: Ayushman Bharat (PM-JAY)
description: The world's largest health insurance scheme providing a cover of ₹5 lakhs per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.
benefits: ₹5 Lakhs cashless health insurance per family per year
